div.h2: Four-Phase Dispatch Loop: Control Flow, Phase Boundaries, and dispatching Flag Lifecycle
div.p: One iteration of reactor_run() — per-tick execution order

text.tspan: so that deferred callbacks in Phase 3

div.p: Phase Ordering Rationale 1→2: epoll_ctl must not run while iterating events[] 2→3: deferred cbs see dispatching=0; ops execute immediately 3→4: cancel_timer in deferred cb prevents spurious timer fire 4→1: I/O processed first; data resets timer before expiry check

text.tspan: if EEXIST on ADD → retry as MOD
so cancel inside cb works correctly
